ksa_text: Skill in developing actionable data and AI strategy recommendations, including prioritized roadmaps, capability investment plans, and organizational design recommendations.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the skill contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('organizational design'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4104); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
